case_title: JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC VS. JASMINE N BLOCKER

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-21-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
